hero.title: Dr. Asiia Vinograd
hero.subtitle: MD, PhD
hero.desc: Practicing cardiologist and USMLE educator helping international medical graduates achieve their dreams of practicing medicine in the United States.

about.title: Credentials & Experience
about.p1: I am a physician, cardiologist, and researcher currently based in Phuket, Thailand — preparing for USMLE Step 1 alongside my students.
about.p2: My path includes medical school at Bashkir State Medical University, cardiology residency, and a PhD from Harbin Medical University in China. I also have 2.5 years of NICU nursing experience, which shaped my passion for neonatology and pediatrics.

curriculum.title: USMLE Step 1 Topics
curriculum.desc: All high-yield topics for Step 1 success — with clinical vignettes and diagnostic algorithms

items.title: Microbiology
items.topics: Gram+ & Gram− bacteria, Viruses, Fungi, Parasites, Antibiotics

items.title: Pharmacology
items.topics: Antibiotics, Cardiovascular drugs, Autonomic, CNS drugs

items.title: Neurology & Psychiatry
items.topics: CNS anatomy, Dementia, Movement disorders, Psychopharmacology

lectures.title: Featured Videos
lectures.desc: Step 1 content built around the most testable concepts

items.title: Gram-Positive Bacteria — Complete Guide
items.desc: Full lab algorithm, Staph vs Strep, spore-forming bacilli, and 4 clinical vignettes.

items.title: Gram-Negative Bacteria — Complete Guide
items.desc: Enterobacteriaceae, oxidase-positive rods, obligate intracellular organisms.

items.title: Staphylococcus Aureus — Deep Dive
items.desc: Toxins, virulence factors, MRSA, and classic Step 1 clinical scenarios.

items.title: Pharmacology — Antibiotics
items.desc: Mechanism of action, resistance patterns, and clinical indications.

items.title: Pathology — Inflammation & Repair
items.desc: Acute vs chronic inflammation, wound healing, granuloma formation.

items.title: Cardiology — ECG & Arrhythmias
items.desc: Systematic ECG reading, arrhythmia mechanisms, and high-yield pharmacology.

connect.title: Study Together
connect.desc: Join IMGs from around the world preparing for USMLE across all platforms

trending.title: Most Popular
trending.desc: The most requested topics among students

items.title: ECG — Made Simple!
items.desc: Read an electrocardiogram from scratch: what to look for, how not to get confused.

items.title: Understanding Lab Tests
items.desc: Clinical breakdown of laboratory values — from normal to pathological.

items.title: Everything About HIV
items.desc: Pathogenesis, stages, diagnosis and treatment — everything you need for Step 1.

problem.title: The struggles every IMG knows
problem.subtitle: Most Russian-speaking IMGs face the same walls when preparing for USMLE.

chaos.title: Too many resources, zero system
chaos.desc: First Aid, Pathoma, Sketchy, UWorld. You switch all day and feel like you're going nowhere.

language.title: Language barrier slows you down
language.desc: You understand the medicine — but English explanations take twice as long to process.

noSystem.title: No idea where to start
noSystem.desc: Everyone says 'just do UWorld' but nobody tells you what to read first, in what order, for how long.

noProgress.title: No sense of progress
noProgress.desc: You study for weeks and still can't tell if you're actually ready for the exam.

format.title: USMLE format feels foreign
format.desc: Two-step clinical vignettes are nothing like the exams you took back home.

alone.title: Studying alone is exhausting
alone.desc: No community, no one to ask, no accountability. Just you and a pile of PDFs.

problem.cta: Dr. Vinograd went through this — and built a system that works.

pricing.title: Choose your path
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Study where it's comfortable for you — Telegram, YouTube, VK, or Patreon.
pricing.note: No lock-in. Cancel or switch anytime.

plans.name: Free Access
plans.desc: Everything you need to get started with USMLE prep.

plans.name: USMLE Club
plans.desc: Full access to all study materials and personal support.

plans.name: Tribute Club
plans.desc: Same full access — pay in rubles via Tribute.
